summary: Comprehensive testing of Macedo SI CRM system after MongoDB to MySQL migration. All critical features tested and working. Fixed enum mismatches in trabalhista and fiscal models, and fixed CompatCursor chaining issue in trabalhista routes.

minor.issue: Legacy endpoint returns 500 - same fix needed as /solicitacoes
Console shows hydration error for div inside p tag in Dashboard StatCard component

issues: Minor React hydration warning - div inside p tag in StatCard loading spinner

critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB compatibility layer (database_compat.py) is working well for SQL operations
Enum values in models need to match database values - added GFIP, ESOCIAL, REINF, OUTROS to TipoObrigacao and FOLHA_PAGAMENTO, OUTROS to TipoSolicitacao
CompatCursor doesn't support MongoDB-style chaining (.skip().limit().sort()) - use parameters instead
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - existing data from MySQL migration used
context_for_next_testing_agent: System migrated from MongoDB to MySQL using database_compat.py compatibility layer. All CRUD operations work through CompatCollection class. Enum values must match database values exactly. CompatCursor supports find(query, skip=X, limit=Y) but NOT .skip().limit().sort() chaining.
rca_of_the_issue: Original issues were: 1) Trabalhista route used MongoDB-style cursor chaining which doesn't work with CompatCursor - fixed by using parameters. 2) Fiscal and Trabalhista models had enum values that didn't match database values (gfip, folha_pagamento) - fixed by adding missing enum values. 3) Some list fields (historico_entregas, documentos_anexos) were None in database but models expected lists - fixed by adding default value handling.
